name: Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch
description_short: Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch is a credit repair provider based in Fort Worth, Texas. Rated 4.6/5 on Google.
description_long:
Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch is a credit repair provider serving clients in Fort Worth, Texas. The company serves consumers in the Fort Worth area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a atm, credit union, Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Fort Worth, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Fort Worth, Texas area who are considering Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
